youtube.description:
Welcome to your Daily Dose of Larp where I search for the best larp videos, and put it all into one video! Every video you see here is very larpy, verified and filmed by a confirmed larper. I don't feature AI generated content, ever. 

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If YOU film a video and think it is good enough to be featured on Daily Dose Of Larp, you can submit videos to me by messaging my Discord which is goblinuh 
or through my instagram which is linked below!
